domain_context: AI News Aggregator Web App (Mobile First, Editorial)
design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. A futuristic, minimalist news terminal avoiding typical dark-mode AI slop (no purple/teal gradients). Relies on stark contrast, sharp borders, and distinct typography to create an authoritative editorial feel.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#F4F4F0] relative sm:border-x sm:border-[#E5E5E0] shadow-2xl shadow-black/5 overflow-x-hidden
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room style: Dense, functional, separated by 1px solid borders. No soft dropshadows on cards. Everything is flat and structural.

top_story_hero.layout: Full width within the mobile container. Large image with a sharp 1px border. No soft gradient overlays, use a harsh bottom gradient if needed or place text strictly below the image.
top_story_hero.typography: Use h1_hero for the headline. Add a 'LIVE' or 'TOP STORY' mono badge in Signal Red (#FF3B30).
top_story_hero.image_treatment: Grayscale or high contrast. Max height 300px, object-cover.

article_card.layout: Vertical stack. No rounded corners (or max rounded-sm). Bottom border 1px solid #E5E5E0 to separate items in the feed.
article_card.metadata_strip: Flex row, items-center, gap-2. Use mono font. Source dot color-coded by category.
article_card.title: h3_article_title, margin-top: 4px, margin-bottom: 4px.
article_card.interaction: Entire card is clickable. Active state bg changes slightly to #E5E5E0.

bottom_tab_nav.layout: Fixed bottom, w-full max-w-md, flex justify-around items-center py-3 px-2 pb-safe.
bottom_tab_nav.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (Regular for inactive, Fill for active).
bottom_tab_nav.active_indicator: A 4px dot under the icon in International Klein Blue (#0000FF).

stats_strip.layout: Sticky just below the header. Marquee or simple flex strip.
stats_strip.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#FFFFFF] py-1.5 px-4 text-[10px] font-mono tracking-widest uppercase flex justify-between items-center
stats_strip.content: Shows total sources, articles, and countdown to next fetch.

pull_to_refresh.style: Mechanical feel. Use a mono text counter 'REFRESHING...' or an ASCII spinner instead of a generic circular spinner.

search_overlay.input: Massive text input (text-3xl font-heading), border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A], no outline, rounded-none bg-transparent.

images.description: A white robot standing in front of a black background. Use for primary AI top story.
Blue background with abstract data lines. Use for research paper section highlights.
Vibrant orange network lines. Use for community or newsletter category covers.

motion.feed_stagger: List items fade and slide up slightly (y: 10, opacity: 0) on mount, staggered by 0.05s.
motion.sheet_slide: Search and Filter sheets slide up from bottom (y: '100%' to '0%') with a spring stiffness of 300 and damping of 30.
motion.button_tap: Scale down slightly (scale: 0.97) on tap to feel tactile.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AAA standards (Black on #F4F4F0 is extremely high contrast).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='bottom-tab-feed', data-testid='article-card-0', data-testid='search-input'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI directly in HTML/Tailwind. Do NOT over-rely on Shadcn Card components for the feed, use raw divs with strict border-bottom rules to achieve the 'Control Room' editorial look.
Ensure fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono) are imported via Google Fonts or Fontshare in index.css.
Make the app strictly a vertical mobile layout (max-w-md centered on desktop).
Include the stats strip marquee to show backend fetch status.
Ensure the data-testid attributes are faithfully applied to all clickable elements and main data containers for testing.
